# Show still images

Put horizontal production stills for each musical here. The result page will automatically look for these filenames:

- Hamilton.png
- Wicked.png
- Les Miserables.png
- The Phantom of the Opera.png
- Hadestown.png
- Chicago.png
- Sweeney Todd.png

Recommended ratio: 16:9 or 3:2, at least 1200px wide.
